sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40905" key="e)piskw/pths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπι-σκώπτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n40905.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mocker</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐπικόπτης</ref> </xr> (q.v.).</sense> </entryFree>
